title: SimpleSuicide
body:
Plugin for Spigot/Paper.

Add suicide command.
Use /sucide or /s to commit suicide.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87ff7d63db99a42b959fd5ba70f5160b67f81ca7.png)

![message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95c2e57357185c09a200ab24dd581c8cef1915a0.png)

config.yml:

```
messages:
  no-permission: §cYou don't have permission
  local-message: §4You committed suicide
  global-message: §4%player% committed suicide
allow-messages:
  local-message-allow: true
  global-message-allow: false
```
permissions:

```
  SimpleSuicide.suicide:
    description: suicide permission
    default: true
```
